summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster and has no canonical; hydrated PRs are classified independently with no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations planned. Five listed refs were not present in the hydrated preflight artifact, so those specific refs need fresh hydration before classification.
